author: Haakon Wibe
description: Cleanup configuration - demonstrates Delete and DeleteKey actions for removing legacy settings
notes: Use 'Delete' action to remove specific registry values.
Use 'DeleteKey' action to remove entire registry keys and all their contents.
This is useful for cleaning up after app uninstalls or removing legacy configurations.
Transaction logs enable rollback if needed (though DeleteKey has limited rollback).

settings.name: Remove Legacy App Settings
settings.description: Clean up registry values left by uninstalled application

settings.name: Remove Legacy App Key Entirely
settings.description: Delete the entire registry key for the old application

settings.name: Remove Unwanted Browser Extensions Registry
settings.description: Clean up extension policies that are no longer needed

settings.name: Remove Old Corporate Branding
settings.description: Clean up previous corporate config before applying new

settings.name: Clean Default User Legacy Settings
settings.description: Remove legacy settings from Default User profile
